name: liangzai
description: Liang Zai agents — supplier invoice reconciliation and cost-per-bowl tracking. Skills call the liangzai gateway MCP for all Sheet, Loyverse, and Gmail-send work; only the invoice download runs locally (the Gmail connector cannot fetch attachment bytes).

gateway_api_key.description: Liang Zai gateway API key (liangzai_live_… — generated when the gateway is deployed). Passed as gateway_api_key on every liangzai_* tool call.
